export default {
	async fetch(request, env) {
		const marker = 'site-worker-placeholder-app'
		const cacheKey = 'placeholder:rpc-smoke'

		const prismaResult = await env.PRISMA_RPC.query('user', 'findMany', {})
		await env.CACHE_RPC.set(cacheKey, {
			metadata: {
				createdTime: Date.now(),
				ttl: 60_000,
				swr: 0,
			},
			value: { marker, at: new Date().toISOString() },
		})
		const cacheResult = await env.CACHE_RPC.get(cacheKey)

		return Response.json({
			marker,
			prisma: prismaResult,
			cache: cacheResult,
			path: new URL(request.url).pathname,
		})
	},
}
